intro: 📺 YouTube Scraper Pro is a ready-to-run Apify actor from FlowExtract API for social media. Case 1: Platform Migration This page explains what it does, who it's for, and how to get the most out of it — then includes the full technical documentation below.
useCases: automatic content type detection - Intelligently identifies videos, shorts, playlists, channels, courses, and live streams
uRL pattern recognition - Understands what you want based on the URL structure
configurable processing speed - Adjust parameters to optimize performance
comprehensive metadata - Get views, publication dates, descriptions, thumbnails, and more

faq.q: How do I run 📺 YouTube Scraper Pro?
faq.a: Open 📺 YouTube Scraper Pro on the Apify Store, provide your input (URLs or search parameters), and click Start. Results are available as JSON, CSV, or Excel, and via the Apify API.
📺 YouTube Scraper Pro runs on Apify's pay-as-you-go platform; you only pay for the compute/usage a run consumes. Check the actor page for current pricing and any free tier.
